concerns.text: T015 mandates raising an explicit exception if download fails, contradicting spec.md (FR-001, US-1) and plan.md which require an automatic fallback to synthetic data generation when no linked public dataset exists. This leaves the 'no public dataset' scenario unimplemented.

T026 mandates using a 'real model' (YOLOv5n) and forbids simulation. This risks violating spec.md (SC-008) and plan.md (Performance Goals) regarding the 6-hour runtime limit on GitHub Actions free-tier (2 CPU) for N≥100 images, as no fallback task exists for timeout/memory failure.

T016 generates synthetic images but lacks instructions to record required metadata (lighting_condition, room_type, demographic_group) alongside images. This fails to satisfy spec.md (SC-007) and plan.md (Constitution Principle VII) which mandate metadata for ecological sampling integrity.

T019 creates a separate 'cv_methods.md' file for citations. However, spec.md (SC-002, SC-005) requires that the *output documentation* and *statistical tables* themselves use associational language and include specific p-value tables. A separate file does not ensure the final analysis output meets these framing requirements.

T036 generates 'multiplicity_table.csv' but does not explicitly link it to the final 'statistics.json' or the report generation step. This risks failing spec.md (SC-005) which requires a summary table of exact and adjusted p-values as part of the final output evidence.
